steps.title: Identify the boundary line
steps.content: The boundary line of the shaded region passes through $(0,1)$ with a negative slope of $-4$, giving the equation $$y = 1 - 4x.$$ This eliminates the two choices that use $1+4x$.

steps.title: Determine the inequality direction from the shading
steps.content: Test a point in the shaded region, such as $(2,0)$, in $y > 1-4x$: $$0 > 1 - 4(2) = -7 \checkmark$$ The point satisfies $y > 1-4x$, so the shading is above the line.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• A) $y < 1+4x$ — wrong slope sign (positive instead of negative). Eliminated.
  • B) $y < 1-4x$ — correct boundary, but the shaded region is above the line, not below. Eliminated.
  • C) $y > 1+4x$ — wrong slope sign. Eliminated.
  • D) $y > 1-4x$ — correct boundary $y=1-4x$ with shading above it.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
